items.description: ARTIFACT_CONTRACT promises results.jsonl removal timeline in changelog; no announcement ever published.
items.evidence: ARTIFACT_CONTRACT L55: 'timeline will be announced in changelog'; CHANGELOG [Unreleased] had no results.jsonl entry before W7-0001.
items.verification: make check-fast green; CHANGELOG + ARTIFACT_CONTRACT cross-reference added
items.notes: Docs-only increment: announce sunset. Actual alias removal is separate Stable-surface escalation (W7-0002).

items.description: results.jsonl legacy alias still emitted on every harness run; removal requires Stable artifact decision.
items.evidence: harness.py creates symlink/copy of records.jsonl; ARTIFACT_CONTRACT marks alias deprecated for 0.3.x removal.
items.notes: Escalate before removing: target version, diff snapshot list, contract tests, migration note.

items.description: visualization shim policy conflicts: CHANGELOG deprecates v2.0.0 removal; shim docstring says indefinite; IMPORT_PATHS says indefinite.
items.evidence: CHANGELOG Unreleased L22-24 vs visualization.py L173-175 vs IMPORT_PATHS.md L46.
items.notes: Policy: deprecate + remove v2.0.0 (match CHANGELOG). Added DeprecationWarning on import to match CHANGELOG/MIGRATION. Full-package 100% tracked as W7-0008.
items.verification: make check-fast green (6730 passed); pytest tests/test_audit_wave7_regressions.py -q --cov=insideLLMs.visualization --cov-report=term-missing → 100% (5 stmts, 0 miss; was module-not-imported); DeprecationWarning on shim import; docs aligned with CHANGELOG v2.0.0

items.description: Remaining-work table marks sunset plan Done while summary table still lists open deprecated-module notes.
items.evidence: AUDIT_FINDINGS L22 vs L183; six shims removed in 0.2.0 but five shims remain without unified matrix.

items.description: trace_contracts, tracing, evaluation shims missing from compatibility matrix.
items.evidence: Shim files exist; IMPORT_PATHS lists export/visualization/pipeline only.
items.notes: Per §7 escalate with removal version proposal (suggest v2.0.0 aligned with visualization).

items.description: Phase 2 mypy: shrink disable_error_code list one code at a time.

items.description: typecheck-strict-runtime aspirational; not yet clean or CI-gated.
Standing item: raise whole-package coverage toward 100% separately from per-increment module coverage gates.
items.evidence: Wave baseline_coverage_pct is 90.0; per-increment requires 100% only on touched modules.
items.notes: True-100% campaign. TOTAL 96% (20004 stmts / 473 miss). Omit still: openai/anthropic/huggingface/cohere/gemini, nlp/*, contrib/*. Slices: 194658e, 1a5b5d5, dd234f5, dac3d60. Priority: measured→0 then shrink omit with mocks. Blockers: ~473 measured misses remain; contrib/~105k LOC still omitted.
